name: soapysdr0.8-module-remote
title: soapysdr0.8-module-remote
summary: Use SoapySDR devices over network (client module)
description:
Use SoapySDR devices over network (client module)
The SoapyRemote project provides a client module and a server that make it
possible on the client side to list and access hardware supported by SoapySDR
modules on the server as if they were local modules.
.
This package contains the client module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use soapysdr0.8-module-remote because Use SoapySDR devices over network (client module).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use soapysdr0.8-module-remote as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair soapysdr0.8-module-remote with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `soapysdr0.8-module-remote --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
